story.title: A story that tastes like home
story.text: Casa Fenicia was born out of love for Lebanese cuisine and Mediterranean hospitality. Every dish tells a story, every ingredient carefully chosen. We invite you to experience a unique gastronomic journey in the heart of Ciutat Vella.
